items.title: [IC] GMK HASRO/SAV Add-on kit - Vendors Announced
items.takeaway: GMK HASRO/SAV Add-on kit Tastierarossa by Skok IC FORM This set is intended to pay homage to OG dye sub HASRO/SAV sets, but in ABS rather than PBT. I originally wanted to run a full base kit but decided to run alphas only to not conflict with sets running soon or that have run recently. The original version was run a long time ago in 2017, so I want to bring it back slightly modernized with Qarmaa's updated sublegends. Thank you for taking the time to read through this post and please fill out the IC form with any feedback. Inspiration More Photo from Litster on Deskthority Kitting Kitting is

items.title: [IC] GMK CYL OBON | Festival of Spirits
items.takeaway: Inspiration? GMK Obon draws inspiration from Japan's most sentimental festival, three summer days where lantern light guides beloved spirits home and it becomes celebration. Vendors(Soon!): Colors: RAL 010 30 44 RAL 020 60 40 RAL 3015 Discord Server - for more updates and suggestions about the future of the project. IC Form - complete if you are interested in this project or you'd like any changes to it Kits: Base Kit Using Custom Hiragana from GMK Inukuma. Novelties Kit Several icons which are related to the theme of spirits, fire and lanterns. Spacebar Kit Your regular spacebar kit. Numpad K
